title: Amtech M1850 10 Piece mixed jigsaw blades with T-slot fitting
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This assorted set of high speed steel and carbon steel blades is suitable for cutting wood, metal and plastic
VERSATILE: With a T-shank fitting, the blades fit most popular makes of jigsaw and are supplied in handy plastic storage case
EASY TO USE: Simple setup and operation for beginners and professionals
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 10x Jigsaw Blades See more
